MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Matthew P. Guichard, Thomas J. Tarkoff, Esq., and Philip Y. Kazan, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar as to Matthwe P. Guichard, and Thomas J. Tarkoff. Order to Show Cause to Philip Y. Kazan, is heard this day. Court ordered Philip Y. Kazan, sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Loretta Najera. (212)
